landing.hero_title: Can You Spot the AI Lie?
landing.hero_desc: TruthLens is an interactive training ground. Learn to identify AI-generated Deepfakes from real media, level up, and build your digital immunity against misinformation.
landing.step1_desc: Analyze a short video clip. Look closely at expressions, lighting, and sync.
landing.step2_desc: Decide within 10 seconds: Is it Real or is it Fake?
landing.step3_desc: Get instant feedback and learn the anatomical visual clues of manipulation.

setup.title: Select Difficulty
setup.desc: Choose your training level. Higher difficulties offer more XP but require finer detail spotting.
setup.beginner_desc: Clear visual artifacts. Slow movements. Perfect for starting out.
setup.intermediate_desc: Subtle manipulation, natural speech. Requires level 2.
setup.advanced_desc: High-fidelity generation. Professional blends. Requires level 3.

play.question: Is this video real or fake?
play.press_key_hint: Press 1 for Real | 2 for Fake | Space/Enter for Next

summary.completed_desc: Great work completing your training rounds. Check your performance metrics below:
summary.no_badges: No new badges unlocked this set.

learn.title: Education Hub
learn.desc: Master media literacy and understand the visual cues that expose manipulated synthetic media.
learn.gan_desc: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) pit two AI models against each other: a Generator (which builds fake images) and a Discriminator (which detects fakes). Over millions of iterations, they produce hyper-realistic faces.
learn.techniques_desc: Face-swapping overlays a source face onto a target actor. While highly advanced, it often leaves discrepancies around hair margins, eye reflections, and audio synchronizations.
learn.checklist_desc: Follow these rapid steps to verify media content in your daily feed:
learn.checklist_item1: Analyze Blinking: Deepfakes often display abnormal, mechanical, or completely absent blinking.
learn.checklist_item2: Inspect Edges: Check for soft, blurry, or flickering outlines around the ears, jawline, and hair.
learn.checklist_item3: Verify Speech Sync: Do lip movements match the phonetic audio sync of double consonants?
learn.checklist_item4: Assess Lighting: Check if eye glints align correctly and if cheek shadows match light sources.
learn.checklist_item5: Check Backgrounds: Look for ghosting, warping, or background texture breathing behind the face.

profile.title: User Progress
profile.desc: Monitor your training level status, active answer streaks, and milestone credentials.
profile.no_badges_desc: Start training to earn badges! Available milestones are listed in the gallery.
